prompts.prompt_b_hormigon_acero:
You are a typographic sculptor. ALL 3 trophies must be LETTERS OR NUMBERS extruded in concrete.
Not abstract forms — literal, recognizable letters from the brand name or award name.

RULES:
- Proposal 1: The FIRST LETTER of the brand name, extruded 8cm deep, self-standing. Fill all counters (holes in letters like B, D, O) with solid concrete bridges.
- Proposal 2: The FIRST LETTER of the award name, in a completely different typographic style (if P1 was serif, P2 must be sans-serif block).
- Proposal 3: The NUMBER of the award edition, or "01", extruded as a 3D numeral.

CRITICAL: forma_descripcion_prompt must specify:
1. Which letter/number it is
2. The exact typographic style (bold geometric sans-serif / condensed serif / slab-serif block)
3. That all counters are filled with concrete bridges
4. Start with "Single monolithic block of refined grey concrete —"
5. End with "no floating elements, all parts attached to base"

Return EXCLUSIVELY a JSON array of 3 concepts, no markdown:
[
  {
    "proposal_id": 1,
    "pattern_name": "nombre que incluya la letra elegida",
    "design_rationale": "1 frase sobre por qué esta letra representa la marca",
    "forma_escultorica": "tipografico",
    "forma_descripcion_prompt": "Single monolithic block of refined grey concrete — bold geometric sans-serif capital letter [X], extruded 8cm deep, self-standing on flat base. All counters filled with solid concrete bridges. no floating elements, all parts attached to base",
    "award_text": {"headline": "nombre del premio", "recipient": "nombre del premiado", "subtitle": "nombre organización"}
  },
  { "proposal_id": 2, ... },
  { "proposal_id": 3, ... }
]
Respond ONLY with the JSON array.
prompts.prompt_base_trofeo_lora: Studio product photography of a sculptural award trophy. Single monolithic sculptural form on neutral grey background #d7d7d7. Soft diffused studio lighting, clean contact shadow at base. Portrait orientation. No text, no letters, no numbers, no words, no markings anywhere on the surface. Sharp focus, clean composition, premium trophy photography.
prompts.prompt_textura_hormigon: This sculptural trophy has a smooth surface. Convert the material to authentic raw concrete: dense grey portland cement with visible fine aggregate particles, natural porosity, soft micro-roughness, matte non-reflective finish. Preserve the EXACT same shape — only change texture. No text, no logos, no new elements.
